creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
GCC 8 is not supported by Mk/bsd.gcc.mk yet (and intentionally so and this
is documented in Mk/bsd.default-versions.mk), nor are lang/gcc*-devel ports 
(and intentionally so).

This framework focuses on releases of GCC, not snapshots, and I am
not planning on changing that.  

If, for some reason, you really, really want to use -devel ports,
this is best addressed by hacking Mk/bsd.gcc.mk.
